text: Add cron scheduling for autonomous daily posting
description:
Current: 100% manual CLI execution
Needed: Automated daily pipeline

Implementation: ~2 hours
- node-cron for scheduling
- Run: ingest → generate → publish daily
- Error recovery + retry logic
- Slack/email notifications on failures

Schedule suggestion:
- Ingest: Daily 6am (capture yesterday's thoughts)
- Generate: Daily 8am (create content while fresh)
- Publish: Daily 10am/2pm/6pm (optimal engagement times)

This achieves "autonomous sharing" from the vision.

status.comment: Implemented autonomous daily posting scheduler using node-cron. Created scheduler.ts with: (1) Daily schedule (ingest 6am, generate 8am, publish 10am/2pm/6pm), (2) Error recovery with 3 retries and 1min delay, (3) Logging to daily files, (4) Graceful shutdown, (5) Notification hooks (ready for email/Slack), (6) systemd service file for production deployment, (7) Comprehensive documentation in SCHEDULER.md. Tested: scheduler starts, schedules all 5 jobs, logs correctly, shuts down cleanly. Ready for production use with `npm run scheduler` or systemd service.
